_description: Relative date filter on a date dimension. Uses class='relative-date' with a date-range node specifying anchor, period, and range units.

filter_last_n_days._description: Show data for the last 30 days relative to today
filter_last_n_days._placement: Inside worksheet > table > view node (sibling to datasources)

filter_last_n_months._description: Show data for the last 3 complete months

filter_year_to_date._description: Show data for the current year to date

filter_date_range_absolute._description: Absolute date range filter (fixed start/end dates)

notes.first_period: Negative = looking back (e.g., -30 = last 30 days); 0 = current period
notes.to_date: to-date='true' for YTD/MTD/QTD — truncates to start of current period
notes.absolute_date_format: Use #YYYY-MM-DD# format for date literals in min/max children
notes.filter_placement: Filters go inside the view node (worksheet > table > view), alongside datasource-dependencies
